mapper.sql: select id, box_id, category_id, sort_order, is_primary, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_box_category_relations
mapper.select: select r.id, r.box_id, r.category_id, r.sort_order, r.is_primary, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug, c.icon as category_icon from gb_box_category_relations r inner join gb_categories c on r.category_id = c.id where r.box_id = #{boxId} order by r.is_primary desc, r.sort_order, r.id
select distinct box_id from gb_box_category_relations where category_id = #{categoryId} order by sort_order, id

select r.id, r.box_id, r.category_id, r.sort_order, r.is_primary, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug, c.icon as category_icon from gb_box_category_relations r inner join gb_categories c on r.category_id = c.id where r.box_id = #{boxId} and r.is_primary = '1' limit 1
select count(*) from gb_box_category_relations where box_id = #{boxId} and category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_box_category_relations
box_id, category_id, sort_order, is_primary, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{boxId}, #{categoryId}, #{sortOrder}, #{isPrimary}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},

insert into gb_box_category_relations (box_id, category_id, sort_order, is_primary, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.boxId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isPrimary}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update gb_box_category_relations set is_primary = case when category_id = #{categoryId} then '1' else '0' end where box_id = #{boxId}
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_box_category_relations where id in
#{id}
delete from gb_box_category_relations where box_id = #{boxId} and category_id = #{categoryId}
